name: toolbelt-assistant
description: Bring one live Toolbelt assistant — its instructions, skills, files, and tools — into Claude. One install = one assistant, toggleable as a connector.

prompts.name: persona
prompts.description: Act as this Toolbelt assistant — loads its current operating instructions live from Toolbelt via the load_persona tool.
prompts.text: Call the load_persona tool from this connector now, then fully adopt the operating instructions it returns for the rest of this conversation.

api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
api_key.description: Your Toolbelt API key (Toolbelt → Settings → Connect to Claude). Stored in your OS keychain; sent as an Authorization: Bearer header, never in a URL.

workspace_id.title: Assistant workspace ID
workspace_id.description: The Toolbelt workspace ID of the assistant to bring into Claude.

assistant_name.title: Assistant name
assistant_name.description: Optional display label (e.g. Chief-of-Staff). Names the persona prompt.
